title: dactylorhiza × bayburtiana
intro: Dactylorhiza × bayburtiana is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross-pollination of two distinct species of the Dactylorhiza genus. This orchid is primarily found in the mountainous regions of Turkey and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing and antimicrobial effects. Dactylorhiza × bayburtiana is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments.
